observations.archetype_gloss: A nurturing, life-giving figure symbolized by her rough, reddened hands and care in holding a clay pot to the sun
observations.summary: The woman embodies the Great Mother archetype through her tactile connection to the earth and nurturing act of holding a clay pot to the sun, symbolizing life and sustenance.

evidence.quote: Her voice in the silence. Her hands rough and reddened from the lye, holding a clay pot up to the afternoon sun.

accepted_observations.summary: The woman embodies the Great Mother archetype through her tactile connection to the earth and nurturing act of holding a clay pot to the sun, symbolizing life and sustenance.

evidence.quote: Her voice in the silence. Her hands rough and reddened from the lye, holding a clay pot up to the afternoon sun.
